; Mitchell Scott (https://github.com/rmitchellscott)
; SPDX-License-Identifier: GPL-3.0-only
; Modified: 2026-04-09T02:48:27Z
;
; Requires: https://github.com/rmitchellscott/rm-librarian
;           https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions/xovi-message-broker
;           https://github.com/asivery/rm-xovi-extensions/qt-command-executor

AFFECT [[14191585701734006116]]
    TRAVERSE [[15740235823693067624]]#[[6504254477]]
        TRAVERSE [[14125623155555875541]]
            LOCATE AFTER [[15960276697142148256]]#[[3507017907087912755]]
            INSERT {
                ~&15960276697142148256&~ {
                    ~&5972374&~: positionAnnotated
                    ~&214632764553&~: ~&6504222003&~("Annotated only")
                    ~&8399601734642709923&~: ~&"15094524446771932550&~
                    ~&7713561545874130&~: ~&214625660372&~
                    ~&254542236275632405&~: ~&6504254477&~.~&233723896107736&~("annotated")
                }
            }
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[5376273845699449139]]
    IMPORT net.asivery.CommandExecutor [[180922.180921]]

    TRAVERSE [[4656948266548654837]]#[[15623861903200516464]]
        LOCATE BEFORE [[1188991711545202711]]#[[15279212660148622075]]
        INSERT {
            CommandExecutor {
                ~&5972374&~: _annotatedCmdExecutor
            }

            ~&214604601930&~ {
                ~&5972374&~: _rescanTimer
                ~&7713147298280334&~: 100
                ~&495358363329399331&~: {
                    _annotatedCmdExecutor.executeCommand("sh", ["-c", "{ echo '>erescanLibrary:' > /run/xovi-mb; cat /run/xovi-mb-out > /dev/null; } &"]);
                }
            }

            function _startAnnotatedDuplication(~&197088457&~, ~&7713428759880064&~) {
                ~&5971598&~.~&254524858248187773&~(function() {
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&214622615378&~ = _duplicateAnnotatedFromIds(~&197088457&~, ~&7713428759880064&~);
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&214622615378&~ > 0) {
                        ~&15623861903200516464&~.~&14825814810595278773&~.~&233726567442689&~({
                            ~&"6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~(~&"3440077958930034273&~, "", ~&214622615378&~),
                            ~&"214641774074&~: ~&14681940438292154192&~.~&254502514718671153&~,
                        });
                    } ~&6503784146&~ {
                        ~&15623861903200516464&~.~&14825814810595278773&~.~&233726567442689&~({
                            ~&"6504315758&~: ~&6504222003&~("No annotated pages found"),
                            ~&"214641774074&~: ~&14681940438292154192&~.~&254502514718671153&~,
                        });
                    }
                });
            }

            readonly property ~&7083178290016&~ _xochitlBase: "/home/root/.local/share/remarkable/xochitl/"

            function _runCmd(cmd, ~&6503646550&~) {
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6502785411&~.parse(_annotatedCmdExecutor.executeCommand(cmd, ~&6503646550&~));
            }

            function _getSelectedIds() {
                ~&197102514&~ sel = ~&15623861903200516464&~.~&254547531013851119&~;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&6504284228&~ = sel.~&6504284228&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (~&6504284228&~ === 0) ~&7083121450889&~ [];
                ~&5972376&~ (~&6504284228&~ === 1) ~&7083121450889&~ [String(sel.selectedId())];
                ~&197102514&~ metaList = _runCmd("sh", ["-c",
                    "ls " + _xochitlBase + "*.metadata 2>/dev/null | sed 's|.*/||;s|\\.metadata$||'"]).stdout.~&6504329413&~();
                ~&5972376&~ (!metaList) ~&7083121450889&~ [];
                ~&197102514&~ allIds = metaList.~&214641616085&~("\n");
                ~&197102514&~ ~&7713561545874130&~ = [];
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < allIds.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                    ~&5972376&~ (sel.~&8399623033206867694&~(allIds[~&180978&~])) {
                        ~&7713561545874130&~.~&6504189257&~(allIds[~&180978&~]);
                    }
                }
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&7713561545874130&~;
            }

            function _duplicateAnnotatedFromIds(~&197088457&~, ~&7713428759880064&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&214622615378&~ = 0;
                ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180978&~ = 0; ~&180978&~ < ~&197088457&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180978&~++) {
                    ~&5972376&~ (_duplicateAnnotatedEntry(~&197088457&~[~&180978&~], ~&7713428759880064&~))
                        ~&214622615378&~++;
                }
                ~&5972376&~ (~&214622615378&~ > 0) {
                    _rescanTimer.~&214641748151&~();
                }
                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214622615378&~;
            }

            function _duplicateAnnotatedEntry(docId, ~&7713428759880064&~) {
                ~&197102514&~ ~&214624950331&~ = ~&233694067165438&~.~&8399431778896295215&~(docId);
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&214624950331&~) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&197102514&~ ~&233731876138901&~ = ~&214624950331&~.~&7713012671454059&~ === ~&7711571060833448&~.~&214586564057&~;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&214629834015&~ = ~&214624950331&~.~&7713012671454059&~ === ~&7711571060833448&~.~&197061219&~;
                ~&197102514&~ ~&8399622833342374598&~ = ~&214624950331&~.~&7713012671454059&~ === ~&7711571060833448&~.~&7711997891205770&~;
                ~&5972376&~ (!~&233731876138901&~ && !~&214629834015&~ && !~&8399622833342374598&~) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&197102514&~ ~&6503664356&~ = _xochitlBase;
                ~&197102514&~ contentStr = _runCmd("cat", [~&6503664356&~ + docId + ".content"]).stdout;
                ~&5972376&~ (!contentStr) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&197102514&~ ~&233724020048228&~;
                try { ~&233724020048228&~ = ~&6502785411&~.parse(contentStr); } catch(~&180974&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~; }

                ~&197102514&~ useCPages = !!(~&233724020048228&~.cPages && ~&233724020048228&~.cPages.~&214637513689&~);
                ~&197102514&~ useFlat = !useCPages && ~&214582398184&~.~&233731871973028&~(~&233724020048228&~.~&214637513689&~);
                ~&5972376&~ (!useCPages && !useFlat) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&197102514&~ docDir = ~&6503664356&~ + docId + ~&"180920&~;
                ~&197102514&~ rmList = _runCmd("sh", ["-c", "ls '" + docDir + "'*.rm 2>/dev/null | sed 's|.*/||;s|\\.rm$||'"]).stdout.~&6504329413&~();
                ~&197102514&~ rmSet = {};
                ~&5972376&~ (rmList) {
                    ~&197102514&~ rmFiles = rmList.~&214641616085&~("\n");
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180987&~ = 0; ~&180987&~ < rmFiles.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180987&~++) {
                        rmSet[rmFiles[~&180987&~]] = ~&6504329801&~;
                    }
                }

                ~&197102514&~ annotatedPages, annotatedIndices;
                ~&5972376&~ (useCPages) {
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&214637513689&~ = ~&233724020048228&~.cPages.~&214637513689&~;
                    annotatedPages = [];
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180985&~ = 0; ~&180985&~ < ~&214637513689&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180985&~++) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (rmSet[~&214637513689&~[~&180985&~].~&5972374&~]) {
                            annotatedPages.~&6504189257&~(~&214637513689&~[~&180985&~]);
                        }
                    }
                } ~&6503784146&~ {
                    annotatedPages = [];
                    annotatedIndices = [];
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180985&~ = 0; ~&180985&~ < ~&233724020048228&~.~&214637513689&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180985&~++) {
                        ~&5972376&~ (rmSet[~&233724020048228&~.~&214637513689&~[~&180985&~]]) {
                            annotatedPages.~&6504189257&~(~&233724020048228&~.~&214637513689&~[~&180985&~]);
                            annotatedIndices.~&6504189257&~(~&180985&~);
                        }
                    }
                }

                ~&233724020023100&~.~&197092075&~("[annotated-dup] format=" + (useCPages ? "cPages" : ~&"6503819504&~) + " rmFiles=" + ~&7081747777088&~.~&6503992357&~(rmSet).~&7082886407723&~ + " annotated=" + annotatedPages.~&7082886407723&~ + " isEbook=" + ~&233731876138901&~);
                ~&5972376&~ (annotatedPages.~&7082886407723&~ === 0) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&197102514&~ newUuid = _runCmd("cat", ["/proc/sys/kernel/random/uuid"]).stdout.~&6504329413&~();
                ~&5972376&~ (!newUuid) ~&7083121450889&~ ~&214625660372&~;

                ~&197102514&~ newBase = ~&6503664356&~ + newUuid;

                ~&197102514&~ _pageId = function(~&6504167078&~) { ~&7083121450889&~ useCPages ? ~&6504167078&~.~&5972374&~ : ~&6504167078&~; };

                ~&5972376&~ (~&233731876138901&~) {
                    _runCmd("cp", [~&6503664356&~ + docId + ".pdf", newBase + ".pdf"]);
                    _runCmd("mkdir", ["-p", newBase]);
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180970&~ = 0; ~&180970&~ < annotatedPages.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180970&~++) {
                        ~&197102514&~ apId = _pageId(annotatedPages[~&180970&~]);
                        _runCmd("cp", [docDir + apId + ".rm", newBase + ~&"180920&~ + apId + ".rm"]);
                    }
                } ~&6503784146&~ {
                    _runCmd("cp", ["-r", docDir, newBase]);
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&214629834015&~) {
                        _runCmd("cp", [~&6503664356&~ + docId + ".pdf", newBase + ".pdf"]);
                    }
                    ~&197102514&~ ~&7712803429185970&~ = useCPages ? ~&233724020048228&~.cPages.~&214637513689&~ : ~&233724020048228&~.~&214637513689&~;
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ ~&180987&~ = 0; ~&180987&~ < ~&7712803429185970&~.~&7082886407723&~; ~&180987&~++) {
                        ~&197102514&~ rpId = _pageId(~&7712803429185970&~[~&180987&~]);
                        ~&5972376&~ (!rmSet[rpId]) {
                            _runCmd(~&"5972680&~, ["-f", newBase + ~&"180920&~ + rpId + ".rm"]);
                            _runCmd(~&"5972680&~, ["-f", newBase + ~&"180920&~ + rpId + "-metadata.json"]);
                        }
                    }
                }

                ~&197102514&~ newContent;
                ~&5972376&~ (useCPages) {
                    newContent = ~&6502785411&~.parse(~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(~&233724020048228&~));
                    newContent.~&254543134818768527&~ = annotatedPages.~&7082886407723&~;
                    ~&5972376&~ (~&233731876138901&~) newContent.~&7713012671454059&~ = ~&"197096067&~;
                    newContent.cPages.~&214637513689&~ = annotatedPages;
                    ~&5972376&~ (newContent.cPages.~&8399738334345324088&~ && annotatedPages.~&7082886407723&~ > 0) {
                        newContent.cPages.~&8399738334345324088&~.~&214644635174&~ = annotatedPages[0].~&5972374&~;
                    }
                } ~&6503784146&~ {
                    ~&197102514&~ cPagesArr = [];
                    ~&197102514&~ redir = ~&233724020048228&~.~&16969906412901305596&~ || [];
                    ~&197085552&~ (~&197102514&~ fi = 0; fi < annotatedIndices.~&7082886407723&~; fi++) {
                        ~&197102514&~ origIdx = annotatedIndices[fi];
                        cPagesArr.~&6504189257&~({
                            ~&"5972374&~: annotatedPages[fi],
                            ~&"197088462&~: { "timestamp": "1:2", ~&"214644635174&~: ~&"180971&~ + String.fromCharCode(97 + fi) },
                            "redir": { "timestamp": "1:2", ~&"214644635174&~: redir[origIdx] !== ~&254550717068498203&~ ? redir[origIdx] : origIdx }
                        });
                    }
                    newContent = {
                        "cPages": {
                            ~&"8399738334345324088&~: { "timestamp": "1:1", ~&"214644635174&~: cPagesArr[0].~&5972374&~ },
                            "original": { "timestamp": "1:1", ~&"214644635174&~: ~&233724020048228&~.~&214637513689&~.~&7082886407723&~ },
                            ~&"214637513689&~: cPagesArr
                        },
                        ~&"9368934380046331502&~: 0,
                        "documentMetadata": ~&233724020048228&~.documentMetadata || {},
                        "extraMetadata": ~&233724020048228&~.extraMetadata || {},
                        ~&"7713012671454059&~: ~&"197096067&~,
                        ~&"7713020516079617&~: "",
                        "formatVersion": 2,
                        ~&"8399749352863178954&~: -1,
                        ~&"233736391113274&~: ~&233724020048228&~.~&233736391113274&~ || 125,
                        ~&"495572996767745525&~: ~&233724020048228&~.~&495572996767745525&~ || ~&"7713446858344574&~,
                        ~&"254543134818768527&~: annotatedPages.~&7082886407723&~,
                        ~&"7713428328436693&~: [],
                        "sizeInBytes": _runCmd("sh", ["-c", "wc -c < '" + ~&6503664356&~ + docId + ".pdf'"]).stdout.~&6504329413&~() || ~&"180921&~,
                        ~&"6504310840&~: [],
                        ~&"12429421770122822733&~: ~&233724020048228&~.~&12429421770122822733&~ || "justify",
                        ~&"254548953487521398&~: ~&233724020048228&~.~&254548953487521398&~ || 1,
                        ~&"7713872915752115&~: ~&233724020048228&~.~&7713872915752115&~ || "bestFit"
                    };
                }

                ~&197102514&~ contentJson = ~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(newContent, ~&6504117156&~, 4);
                _runCmd("sh", ["-c",
                    "cat > '" + newBase + ".content' << 'CONTENTEOF'\n" + contentJson + "\nCONTENTEOF"]);

                ~&197102514&~ ~&505890565057603928&~ = ~&214624950331&~.~&505890565057603928&~ + " - Annotated";
                ~&197102514&~ now = String(~&6502586279&~.now());
                ~&197102514&~ metadataObj = {
                    ~&"477188260000511888&~: now,
                    ~&"16176729529256507806&~: now,
                    ~&"8399738334345324088&~: ~&"180921&~,
                    ~&"18264705319832144597&~: 0,
                    "new": ~&214625660372&~,
                    ~&"7083038346995&~: ~&7713428759880064&~,
                    "pinned": ~&214625660372&~,
                    ~&"7083172477658&~: "",
                    ~&"6504337259&~: "DocumentType",
                    ~&"505890565057603928&~: ~&505890565057603928&~
                };
                ~&197102514&~ metadataJson = ~&6502785411&~.~&254548178208422824&~(metadataObj, ~&6504117156&~, 4);
                _runCmd("sh", ["-c",
                    "cat > '" + newBase + ".metadata' << 'METAEOF'\n" + metadataJson + "\nMETAEOF"]);

                ~&7083121450889&~ ~&6504329801&~;
            }
        }

        TRAVERSE [[254480451320573660]]#[[10067267097605298081]]
            TRAVERSE [[919855502196284289]]
                REBUILD [[254542236275632405]]
                    LOCATE BEFORE { ~&15623861903200516464&~.~&14825814810595278773&~ }
                    INSERT {
                        ~&5972376&~ (~&7082453764199&~ === "annotated") {
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&197088457&~ = ~&15623861903200516464&~._getSelectedIds();
                            ~&197102514&~ ~&7713428759880064&~ = String(~&7712989590835962&~.~&7508603741296241446&~());
                            ~&15623861903200516464&~.~&7082529440655&~();
                            ~&15623861903200516464&~._startAnnotatedDuplication(~&197088457&~, ~&7713428759880064&~);
                            ~&7083121450889&~;
                        }
                    }
                END REBUILD
            END TRAVERSE
        END TRAVERSE
    END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
